sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114150" key="xlidano/sfuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλῐδ-ᾰνόσφῠρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114150.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with delicate ankles,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4105.tlg001:41:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacreont.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
